element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Available from start; foundational to all races
Core mechanic; becomes necessary as difficulty increases; risk of being shoved off
Knock down opponents to earn money; essential for competitive advancement

element_introduction_order.element: Weapons (nunchaku, chains, pipes, crowbars, whips, baseball bats)
element_introduction_order.first_appears: Races with traffic cones signaling weapon locations
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Picked up from road; can be stolen from armed opponents; multi-weapon carrying and cycling

element_introduction_order.element: Trick system (button presses during midair ramps)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Judge ranking system; complexity-based reward for money generation

element_introduction_order.element: Police cars (higher skitching reward, arrest risk)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Risk-reward mechanic; fines for apprehension offset by superior monetary gain
Skates, wheels, protective gear wear; blowouts and hospital visits penalty system
Difficulty scaling; AI becomes more competitive and combat-oriented

typical_tension_triggers: Opponent attempting to shove player off skitched vehicle
Police car pursuit and arrest risk
Competing for race position (top 5 placement requirement)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating high-intensity combat/skitching sequences with moment-to-moment risk management, punctuated by shop breaks; intensity escalates across tournament progression

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Traffic cones indicate nearby weapons on roadside

difficulty_curve.early_game: Foundational mechanics introduced; opponents passive; basic skitching available; entry-level race fees
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Opponent aggression increases; police car introduction; weapon proliferation; equipment degradation becomes factor; higher race entry fees
difficulty_curve.late_game: AI significantly more aggressive; skitching vehicles become faster and harder to mount; police encounters more dangerous; equipment maintenance critical
notable_spikes: Introduction of police cars (higher risk, higher reward)
Late-game vehicle speed increases making skitching timing critical

notable_level_patterns.description: 12 different city races (Vancouver, NYC, San Diego, etc.); player must finish 5th or higher to advance; each race advances through tournament bracket
Players can slingshot from one vehicle to another via skitching, creating momentum chains; slingshot mechanic allows escape from opponents on same vehicle
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any race with multiple traffic vehicles

notable_level_patterns.description: Money earned through race placement, skitching, tricks, and combat encounters; inter-race shop phase manages equipment and entry fees; economy gates progression
Police cars offer 2x skitching reward but carry arrest/fine penalty; weapon pickup sites are marked but require navigation choice; worn equipment is cheaper but increases crash risk
